# Pull Request Summary

Describe the change or proposal clearly.

## Type of public contribution

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Wiki / repo organization
- [ ] UI / UX proposal
- [ ] Screenshot or visual reference
- [ ] Compatibility note
- [ ] Feature proposal for private implementation review

## Why this helps

Explain the user problem or improvement.

## Scope check

- [ ] This PR does not include private source code from the closed Mocha
      development repository
- [ ] This PR does not include secrets, deployment data, or production
      credentials
- [ ] I understand accepted product changes may be manually ported into the
      private repository rather than merged directly into a public codebase

## Screenshots or references

If relevant, add screenshots, mockups, or historical references here.
